title: phryne hispanica
intro: Phryne hispanica, also known as Phryne, is a plant native to the Mediterranean region that has been used in traditional medicine for centuries. It is a perennial herb with yellow flowers and has been valued for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe and heal wounds. The health benefits of Phryne hispanica include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and support the immune system. Phryne hispanica can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
